title: Bloomdale
description: A Stardew Valley inspired Modpack full of immersive mechanics and tons of decorations.
body:
## Farm & Life

![Barn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12114f969bfccea3e1074c02ec6cb26883187aba.png)

Plant, harvest, cook, and grow your farm.

## Cozy Decor

![Kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d9bab6dbecacee935ce89389cd1be7cd7c6f5cd.png)

Decorate your home with furniture, lights, and personal touches.

## Adventure Beyond

![Fishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a96f5835c63159f420b91596425e5d76beb0f4b6.png)

Explore forests, caves, and hidden ruins for treasure and mystery.

## Companions & Pets



Make friends, raise pets, and share your world.

## Seasonal Vibes

![Autumn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad9b3187e24f7f613f432d54501a21981a07bf5.png)

Experience the changing seasons with Serene Seasons.

## Optional Shaders / Effects

![Greenhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf3e4de1073240420460800a7fa11f3491d80c83.png)

Shaders optional for extra cozy aesthetics.

## Goal / Vibe
Bloomdale is Stardew Valley in Minecraft. Cozy home life, thrilling adventure beyond the fence, farming, decorating, exploring, and making the world your own.
